details.productUrlName: Arwen Mortal Queen Extended Art Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Arwen, Mortal Queen enters the battlefield with an indestructible counter on it.
1, Remove an indestructible counter from Arwen: Another target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter and a lifelink counter on that creature and a +1/+1 counter and a lifelink counter on Arwen.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
